latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: The generated drawing still visibly differs from the same-name reference drawing in composition, annotation pattern, and sheet treatment.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The generated view arrangement has shifted to a different front/side/projected layout and does not match the reference view distribution.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Structured evidence still reports generated DisplayDim below the reference floor and missing post-layout reference-intent target coverage.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension placement remains dense and clustered around the generated primary/projected views, with several callouts difficult to read at the UI review scale.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The generated sheet still contains a non-reference title block/table area and does not match the compact reference treatment.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes, blue technical annotations, and reference-style warning/requirements are not reproduced in the same layout or completeness.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated drawing still visibly differs from the same-name reference drawing in composition, annotation pattern, and sheet treatment.
correction_actions.correction_action: Match the same-name SLDDRW reference composition before considering API metrics sufficient.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated view arrangement has shifted to a different front/side/projected layout and does not match the reference view distribution.
correction_actions.correction_action: Use the learned normalized layout slots and avoid default title-block-driven sheet placement.

correction_actions.source_note: Structured evidence still reports generated DisplayDim below the reference floor and missing post-layout reference-intent target coverage.
correction_actions.correction_action: Create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim objects for visible manufacturing callouts.

correction_actions.source_note: Dimension placement remains dense and clustered around the generated primary/projected views, with several callouts difficult to read at the UI review scale.
correction_actions.correction_action: Arrange dimensions into readable lanes and reject overlap or sparse generic AutoDimension output.

correction_actions.source_note: The generated sheet still contains a non-reference title block/table area and does not match the compact reference treatment.
correction_actions.correction_action: Remove or suppress the oversized default title block/frame when it conflicts with the reference layout.

correction_actions.source_note: Manufacturing notes, blue technical annotations, and reference-style warning/requirements are not reproduced in the same layout or completeness.
correction_actions.correction_action: Preserve reference-style notes, roughness, warning text, and compact callout regions.
